name: Djerriwarrh Investments Limited
analysis: DJW's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.8000, stop A$2.7225, target A$3.0325 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
